name: openfeature-file-mode-flex-template
description: Dataflow Flex Template example using OpenFeature + flagd FILE mode

parameters.name: appEnv
parameters.label: Application environment
parameters.helpText: Environment value injected into OpenFeature evaluation context. Example: dev, staging, prod.

parameters.name: flagFilePath
parameters.label: Worker-local flag JSON path
parameters.helpText: Absolute local path inside each worker container (not gs://). Example: /opt/flags/flags-prod.json.

parameters.name: input
parameters.label: Input path
parameters.helpText: Optional input file path. If omitted, demo records are generated.
